charter.phase_name: V1.12BT Phase-Conditioned Veto And Eligibility Extraction
charter.mission: Translate the high-dimensional offensive bundles, veto neighborhoods, and transition veto bands into phase-conditioned control objects: eligibility, entry veto, holding veto, and risk-off override.
in_scope: extract phase-conditioned eligibility rules from offensive geometry
extract entry-veto rules from veto neighborhoods
extract holding-veto rules from transition bands
out_of_scope: returning to low-dimensional hard gate sweeps

interpretation: V1.12BT opens because risk structure is now visible as dangerous regions, and the lawful next move is to turn those regions into control objects.
The goal is not another abstract risk memo; it is explicit extraction of eligibility, veto, and override candidates.
